name: @markdown-contract/dashboard
description: SPIKE — the shared vault-dashboard as a Nuxt LAYER: pages + composables coded against an INJECTED transport (the ontogen Transport contract). Consumed via `extends` by apps/web (HTTP transport) and apps/desktop (IPC transport). Source-shipped, never published.
author: sksizer

scripts.sync:bindings: bun run scripts/sync-bindings.ts && biome check --write bindings
